2606.26671.title: NebulaExp-8B: An Empirical Post-Training Pipeline via Full-Scale Ablation Research
2606.26671.paper_summary: Post-training alignment determines the reasoning and human preference following capabilities of large language models, yet most existing works withhold detailed data construction, filtering rules and training recipes, which hinders community reproducibility and lightweight model optimization. This work presents NebulaExp, a fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline built on Qwen3-8B-base, covering two orthogonal model branches: general instruct model and complex reasoning-specialized model. We curate a raw corpus of 3.84M multi-source SFT samples and a 200K verifiable RL candidate pool, and design an end-to-end data processing stack including response distillation, multi-dimensional cross-verification filtering, fine-grained difficulty grading, task classification and diversity-aware sampling. For the Instruct branch, our three-stage optimized supervised fine-tuning approach NebulaExp-Ins-SFT improves the average benchmark score from the 55.01 baseline of Qwen3-8B-nothink to 60.99. GRPO reinforcement learning then further elevates the average score to 61.85. For the Reasoning branch, medium-difficulty GRPO RL improves average reasoning score from 73.88 to 75.17. To address RL's dependency on task verifiers, we systematically investigate single-teacher and multi-teacher OPD (MOPD): utilizing merely 4K instruction-following samples and outperforms RL baseline by 3.26 points on IFEval with +4.43 average overall gain; MOPD fuses four domain-specialist teachers with merely 10K samples, lifting average performance by 4.18 over the base model. This report provides a fully reproducible empirical post-training recipe for 8B-scale LLMs, and comprehensively dissects the capability trade-offs among instruction adherence, mathematical reasoning, code generation and general knowledge.
2606.26671.paper_summary_zh: 後訓練對齊決定了大型語言模型的推理和人類偏好隨後的能力，但大多數現有的工作都未提供詳細的數據構建、過濾規則和訓練配方，這妨礙了社群的可重複性和輕量模型的優化。這項工作提出了NebulaExp，一個完全透明、基於消融驅動的後訓練流程，建立在Qwen3-8B-base之上，涵蓋兩個正交的模型分支：通用指令模型和複雜推理專用模型。我們策劃了一個包含384萬多來源SFT樣本的原始語料庫和一個20萬可驗證的RL候選池，並設計了一個端到端的數據處理堆疊，包括響應蒸餾、多維交叉驗證過濾、細粒度難度分級、任務分類和多樣性感知抽樣。對於指令分支，我們的三階段優化監督微調方法NebulaExp-Ins-SFT將平均基準分數從Qwen3-8B-nothink的55.01基線提高到60.99。隨後，GRPO強化學習進一步將平均分數提升至61.85。對於推理分支，中等難度的GRPO RL將平均推理分數從73.88提高到75.17。為了解決RL對任務驗證者的依賴，我們系統地研究了單教師和多教師OPD（MOPD）：僅利用4000個遵循指令的樣本，並在IFEval上超越RL基線3.26分，整體增益為+4.43；MOPD融合了四位領域專家的教師，僅用10000個樣本，將平均性能提高了4.18，超過基線模型。本報告提供了一個完全可重複的8B規模LLM的實證後訓練配方，並全面剖析了指令遵循、數學推理、代碼生成和一般知識之間的能力權衡。
2606.26671.author: Qiaobo Hao et.al.
2606.26671.authors: Qiaobo Hao, Yangqian Wu, Shunyi Wang, Zhongjian Zhang, Ziqun Li, Yayin He, Muqing Li, Chen Zhong
